message:
refactor(manifest): consolidate validation into validate.ts and fix topo sort

packages/manifest/src/parser.ts:
- Replace inline dependency-existence checking loop with a call to
  validateDependencyExistenceAdvanced() from validate.ts, eliminating
  duplicated logic between parser.ts and validate.ts
- Replace local validatePhaseOrdering() function with a call to
  validatePhaseOrderingAdvanced() from validate.ts, removing ~30 lines
  of duplicate phase-violation detection code
- Import validatePhaseOrdering and validateDependencyExistence from
  validate.ts alongside the existing detectDependencyCycles import

packages/manifest/src/parser.test.ts:
- Update the unknown-dependency test assertion from "Unknown dependency"
  to "which does not exist" to match the error message format used by
  validateDependencyExistenceAdvanced() in validate.ts

packages/manifest/src/utils.ts:
- Pre-sort modules by phase number before topological sort traversal
  in sortModulesByInstallOrder() so that unconnected components (modules
  with no dependency edges between them) are visited in phase order
  rather than arbitrary array order; this ensures that phase-1 modules
  appear before phase-5 modules even when they have no explicit
  dependency relationship

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
